overview: Optimize U provides hormone optimization therapy to address age-related decline in vitality, energy, and sexual function through comprehensive lab testing and customized treatment plans. The clinic offers both in-person and telemedicine consultations with longer appointment times to ensure thorough care.
highlights: In-house phlebotomy and lab draw services
Home delivery of medications in discreet packaging
Recovery services including cryotherapy, IR saunas, and compression therapy
targetAudience: Adults experiencing age-related symptoms like low energy, declining sexual function, or difficulty maintaining fitness.
